vocab.meaning: một khoảng thời gian học tập khó khăn ban đầu (đòi hỏi nỗ lực lớn)
vocab.example: There was a steep learning curve when I first started my engineering degree, but mastering the basics was incredibly rewarding.
Studying sociology has really helped broaden my horizons regarding how different cultures interact.
Our seminars on environmental ethics always provide plenty of food for thought after class ends.

vocab.meaning: thấu hiểu một vấn đề phức tạp
vocab.example: The most interesting part is finally being able to get your head around quantum mechanics after weeks of struggle.
I find the practical applications of my research fascinating because I know they will be beneficial in the long run.

vocab.meaning: dồn hết tâm trí và nhiệt huyết vào việc gì đó
vocab.example: The final year project gives me a chance to really sink my teeth into a topic I'm passionate about.

vocab.meaning: những gì tốt nhất/nhóm người xuất sắc nhất
vocab.example: Being surrounded by classmates who are the cream of the crop pushes me to perform at my absolute best.

vocab.meaning: với kết quả mỹ mãn/điểm số cao
vocab.example: The challenge of passing a difficult module with flying colours is what keeps me motivated in my studies.

vocab.meaning: thức khuya để học tập/làm việc
vocab.example: While I sometimes have to burn the midnight oil, the thrill of discovering new data makes it all worthwhile.
I truly believe that knowledge is power, and the most exciting thing is gaining tools to change the world.
